{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Queen Cynara the Second
| aliases = Cynara the Second
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Queen Cynara the Second]] was involved in raising the walls of [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Cynara]] the Second was a [[Queen of Damasca]] who remained alive to seal the other eight [[Incarnations]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
